Home / Withdrawal Issues

4. How a player can make a withdrawal if the agent doesn't have enough epos balance

Important Notes: If the agent doesn't have enough funds to pay the player, it is better not to process the withdrawal until the agent's balance is sufficient to avoid any complications.

Option 1: Agent Deposits to Other Players

The agent can deposit funds to other players' accounts to increase his balance, because after the deposit, the funds go from the limit to the agent's balance. By doing this, the agent may be able to process the player's withdrawal request for the required amount.

Option 2: Contact Security Team for Alternative Withdrawal Method

If the agent is unable to resolve the issue by depositing funds, the player can contact the Security team directly via email security@1xbet-team.com with:

  1. A full description of the situation, including any supporting documents.
  2. A request for approval to withdraw using an alternative method (e.g., cryptocurrency, bank transfer).
  3. Contact details (e.g., cryptocurrency wallet address).
  4. A clear passport photo and personal photos for verification.

Once the Security team receives the request, they will review and approve the withdrawal via an alternative method, if applicable.
